# Portfolio Assets

Drop generated image files here using these filenames:

- `hero-control-panel.png`
- `mlops-pipeline.png`
- `network-observability.png`
- `aouroui-logo.svg`
- `aouroui-apple-touch.png`
- `aouroui-og.png`
- `me-256.webp`
- `me-512.webp`
- `me-256.jpeg`
- `me-512.jpeg`

Tool logos live in `tools/` so the portfolio does not depend on CDN logo requests at runtime.

These assets should not include company logos, readable internal identifiers, hostnames, ticket IDs, private URLs, or customer-specific data.
